title: FormulaConditionReportingConfig
description: FormulaConditionReportingConfig: Config object containing settings for reporting results of checks against formula conditions.

ComponentConfigs.description: Dictionary of reporting configs (values) bound to the components, which values they are meant to format (keys).

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
